summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard refactoring and dark mode consistency. All 16 admin tabs load correctly after extracting 14 components. Backend APIs (18 tests) passed. Fixed bug in revenue-trends endpoint. Dark mode toggle works on landing page and admin dashboard.

minor.issue: TypeError when avg_order_value was None - FIXED by adding null coalescing (or 0)

admin_dashboard_tabs.details: All 16 tabs load correctly after AdminDashboard.jsx refactoring

dark_mode_toggle.landing_page: Theme toggles between dark and light correctly
dark_mode_toggle.admin_dashboard: Dark mode displays correctly with proper contrast

dark_mode_consistency.details: Admin Dashboard, charts, forms all render correctly in dark mode

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: type NoneType doesn't define __round__ method
bug_fixed.root_cause: avg_order_value could be None when no orders exist for a period

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx successfully refactored from ~4400 lines to 2817 lines with 14 tab components extracted
All tab components properly exported from frontend/src/pages/admin/index.js
Dark mode CSS variables correctly defined in theme.css and index.css
ThemeContext.jsx properly manages dark/light mode state with localStorage persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard refactoring verified - all 16 tabs (Overview, Analytics, Orders, Users, Gift Codes, Discounts, Coupon Usage, Reviews, Inventory, Blog, Subscribers, Instagram, Inquiries, Settings, Abandoned Carts, Restore Order) render correctly. Dark mode toggle functional on landing page and admin dashboard. Backend revenue-trends endpoint had None value bug that was fixed.
rca_of_the_issue: Revenue trends endpoint bug - when aggregating revenue data, avg_order_value could be None if no orders existed for a time period. Fix: Added null coalescing (or 0) before calling round() function.
